summary:
No stale references remain. All three feedback items are resolved:

- **F1**: buttons in §6.3 now use `px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold` (matching primary/secondary spec and the file's existing `Approve Define`/`Send answers` precedent), with secondaries kept as `bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50`.
- **F2**: Explore, Clarifying Questions, Repeat from the Beginning, and Done now each carry `data: { turbo_submits_with: "…" }`, matching the adjacent `Send answers` form's pattern.
- **F3**: `Phases::Convergence` moved from `app/services/phases/` to `app/queries/phases/convergence.rb`, with a note explaining it's a read-only query object per `guides/backend-guide.md`, not a verb-first `Result`-returning service — the file-level plan and test path were updated to match.

Summary: I revised `.pipeliner/phases/02-plan/main/design-writer/output/design.md` to address all three critic findings — corrected the paused-menu button styling and added `turbo_submits_with` loading affordances in §6.3 to match `ui-style-guide.md` and existing in-file precedent, and relocated `Phases::Convergence` to `app/queries/phases/convergence.rb` (with rationale) so it's correctly classified as a read-only query object rather than a verb-first service, per `backend-guide.md`.
